subject: [PATCH v2 05/21] nfsd: check nfsd4_acl_to_attr() return value in nfsd4_create()

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where ACL translation errors were being silently discarded during file creation. The patch adds an early exit check after nfsd4_acl_to_attr() to ensure that any errors are properly handled and do not get overwritten by subsequent code. This fix ensures that ACLs are correctly translated and applied during file creation, preventing potential security issues.
